calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-23-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840
Petitioner Jaleace Indya Smith, mother of minor present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examined.
Proof of Publication on file.
Court on the record made inquiries in referece to the other parent. The court finds good cause for waiver of the requirement to give notice to other parent.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.
The court grants the petition for Change of Name of minor from Justin Le Charles Wilson Jr. to Justin Le Charles Smith.
Decree Changing Name signed in open court.
